items.name: Clawriting
items.description: Clawriting is an enterprise-grade OpenClaw Skill for long-form papers/reports under tight context limits. It generates a 3+ level Pyramid outline, turns it into section task cards, writes section-by-section with GlobalBrief/SectionBrief memory, supports resume checkpoints, quality gates + rewrites, and final stitching + consistency QA.

items.name: LSTN
items.description: LSTN is an experimental text generation engine that models language not as static probabilities, but as a dynamic and "liquid" neural network. Each trigram (3-character sequence) acts as an individual neuron within a continuous temporal dynamic system.
